name: 抖音短视频封面

prompt_template.subject: {product_or_person}
prompt_template.composition: eye-catching, high contrast, hook in 3 seconds

defaults.action: dynamic movement or interaction with product

overrides.action: dramatic before/after reveal or surprising result
overrides.composition: split screen comparison or dramatic reveal

overrides.action: showing the result of a tutorial
overrides.composition: step number overlay, final result showcase

overrides.action: participating in a challenge or trend

overrides.composition: streamer hero shot with live indicator, time overlay
price highlight, countdown element, CTA button

category_tips.skincare: before/after reveal, texture close-up, reaction shot
category_tips.fashion: transformation reveal, outfit change, style surprise
category_tips.food: cooking reveal, taste reaction, final dish showcase
category_tips.furniture: comfort demonstration, style reveal, room transformation

examples: Engaging Douyin video cover thumbnail. {product_or_person} in {dynamic_action} moment. High visual impact composition with {emotion_expression}. The image hooks viewer in first 3 seconds. Bold contrast, saturated colors matching platform aesthetic. Text overlay 「{headline}」 in bold font, product prominently visible. 9:16 vertical 1080x1920px for Douyin platform

TikTok-style attention-grabbing cover. {persona} showing {emotion_expression} while {dynamic_action}. Centered composition with product as hero. High saturation, dramatic lighting creating visual punch. Brief text 「{headline}」 overlaid. 1080x1920px, 9:16 aspect ratio optimized for mobile viewing

anti_ai_tips.motion_blur: 适度动态模糊增加真实动感
anti_ai_tips.imperfect_composition: 略微偏移的构图增加真实感
anti_ai_tips.natural_expression: 真实表情、不是完美模特脸
anti_ai_tips.phone_aesthetic: 手机拍摄质感、不是电影级制作

style_lock_fields.palette: 高饱和色系 + 强对比
style_lock_fields.lighting: 戏剧性光线或明亮自然光
